description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a pink cartoon animal with large, floppy ears and a round, friendly face. The toy has oversized, expressive eyes with dark pupils and a small, smiling mouth, giving it a cheerful and approachable appearance. Its body is soft and rounded, with short limbs and a slightly chubby build, and it sits on a decorative, flat base with a gold pattern. The fur is uniformly light pink, with subtle shading and texture that enhances its cuddly look. The ears are particularly prominent, extending widely to each side, and the toy's overall design is whimsical and inviting. There are no visible clothing items or accessories, and the toy appears to be well-crafted with attention to detail in the stitching and facial features.
description: A pink plush stuffed toy with large floppy ears, big expressive eyes, and a cheerful smile, sitting on a decorative base. Its soft, rounded body and whimsical design make it appear friendly and cuddly.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large floppy ear, round face, and one big eye, with the plush body sitting on a decorative base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, both extended ears, and the plush body with minimal facial features visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the other large ear, the side of the face, and the plush body, with one eye partially visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full face with both big eyes, smiling mouth, and both floppy ears extended outward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with large, wide-open eyes and a small, smiling mouth. The features give the toy a welcoming and happy appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms and legs bent, and large ears extended outward to the sides.
